---
title: "Share of Statewide School Closure Days by Cause"
format:
  html:
    fig-width: 11
    fig-height: 5.8
    fig-dpi: 180
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(scales)

to_number <- function(x) {
  readr::parse_number(as.character(x), na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "*"))
}

safe_divide <- function(num, den) {
  if_else(!is.na(den) & den > 0, num / den, NA_real_)
}

primary_cause_vars <- c(
  "days_wildfire",
  "days_natural_disasters_weather",
  "days_infrastructure",
  "days_student_safety",
  "days_other"
)

data_file <- "annual_school_closures_standardized_test_scores_ca_2003_2019.csv"
data_path_candidates <- c(
  file.path("..", "data", "raw", "school_fire", data_file),
  file.path("data", "raw", "school_fire", data_file)
)

data_path <- data_path_candidates[file.exists(data_path_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(data_path)) {
  stop("Could not find the closure CSV. Check the relative path from this Quarto file.")
}

closure_data <- readr::read_csv(
  data_path,
  col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  clean_names()

if ("days_wildfires" %in% names(closure_data) && !"days_wildfire" %in% names(closure_data)) {
  closure_data <- closure_data |>
    rename(days_wildfire = days_wildfires)
}

cause_lookup <- tibble(
  cause = primary_cause_vars,
  cause_label = factor(
    c(
      "Wildfire",
      "Natural disasters/weather",
      "Infrastructure",
      "Student safety",
      "Other"
    ),
    levels = c(
      "Wildfire",
      "Natural disasters/weather",
      "Infrastructure",
      "Student safety",
      "Other"
    )
  ),
  cause_code = c("WF", "WX", "IN", "SS", "OT")
)


stacked_bar_palette <- c(
  "Wildfire" = "#EA6D4B",
  "Natural disasters/weather" = "#49AFA1",
  "Infrastructure" = "#254655",
  "Student safety" = "#F4A35B",
  "Other" = "#B8B8B8"
)

```

```{r wildfire-share-stacked-bar}
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 12
statewide_by_year <- closure_data |>
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    across(any_of(primary_cause_vars), to_number),
    across(any_of(primary_cause_vars), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))
  ) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    across(all_of(primary_cause_vars), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

year_levels <- sort(unique(statewide_by_year$year))

statewide_share <- statewide_by_year |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(primary_cause_vars),
    names_to = "cause",
    values_to = "closure_days"
  ) |>
  left_join(cause_lookup, by = "cause") |>
  group_by(year) |>
  mutate(
    year_primary_total = sum(closure_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    share = safe_divide(closure_days, year_primary_total),
    year_index = match(year, year_levels),
    segment_label = if_else(closure_days > 0 & share >= 0.08, cause_code, NA_character_),
    label_color = if_else(cause_label %in% c("Infrastructure", "Other"), "#2A2A2A", "white")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!is.na(share))

title_badge <- tibble(
  x = 0.55,
  y = 1.12,
  label = "Wildfire"
)

title_rest <- tibble(
  x = 2.12,
  y = 1.12,
  label = "years stand apart in California school closures"
)

title_subtitle <- tibble(
  x = 0.55,
  y = 1.05,
  label = "Share of statewide primary closure days by documented cause, 2003-2019. Each column sums to 100%."
)

stacked_bar_plot <- ggplot(
  statewide_share,
  aes(x = year_index, y = share, fill = cause_label, group = cause_label)
) +
  geom_col(
    width = 1,
    color = alpha("white", 0.35),
    linewidth = 0.08,
    position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE)
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = segment_label, color = label_color),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE),
    size = 2.1,
    fontface = "bold",
    na.rm = TRUE,
    check_overlap = TRUE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = title_badge,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    fill = "#D5979E",
    color = "white",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 6,
    label.padding = grid::unit(4, "pt"),
    label.r = grid::unit(0, "pt"),
    linewidth = 0
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = title_rest,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    color = "#111111",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = title_subtitle,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    color = "#555555",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = stacked_bar_palette, name = NULL) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(year_levels),
    labels = year_levels,
    expand = expansion(add = 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = NULL,
    breaks = NULL,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0.5, length(year_levels) + 0.5),
    ylim = c(0, 1),
    clip = "off",
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    caption = "Note: Wildfire accounted for 96% of primary closure days in 2004, 90% in 2008, 91% in 2018 and 80% in 2019.",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      nrow = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      keywidth = unit(18, "pt"),
      keyheight = unit(4, "pt")
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "#303030", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.35),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "#303030", linewidth = 0.3),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(3, "pt"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "#4A4A4A", margin = margin(t = 6)),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, color = "#111111", margin = margin(b = 5)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "#555555", margin = margin(b = 14)),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, color = "#666666", hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 9)),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "left",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "#5D6461"),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 6, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(70, 10, 10, 10)
  )

stacked_bar_plot
```

```{r}
dir.create(file.path("reports", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path("reports", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(statewide_share, file.path("reports", "tables", "statewide_share.csv"))
```

```{r}
year_levels
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  filename = file.path("reports", "figures", "stacked_bar_plot.png"),
  plot = stacked_bar_plot,
  width = 14,
  height = 7.2,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```
